nasb.text: And when they had prayed, the place where they had gathered together was shaken, and they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak the word of God with boldness.

esv.text: And when they had prayed, the place in which they were gathered together was shaken, and they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and continued to speak the word of God with boldness.

cnv.text: 他們禱告完了，聚會的地方震動起來，他們都被聖靈充滿，放膽傳講　神的道。

ccb.text: 祷告完后，聚会的地方震动起来，他们都被圣灵充满，放胆传扬上帝的道。

csbs.text: 他们祷告完了，聚集的地方就被震动，大家都被圣灵充满，就坦然无惧地传讲神的话语。
